Record Class MouseEvent.MouseCursorMovedEvent

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.event.input.MouseEvent.MouseCursorMovedEvent
Record Components:
stage - the stage on which the cursor was moved
oldX - the old X coordinate of the cursor
oldY - the old Y coordinate of the cursor
newX - the new X coordinate of the cursor
newY - the new Y coordinate of the cursor
pressedButtons - the buttons that were pressed when the cursor was moved (immutable)
All Implemented Interfaces:
Event, InputEvent, MouseEvent
Enclosing interface:
MouseEvent
public static record MouseEvent.MouseCursorMovedEvent(Stage stage, double oldX, double oldY, double newX, double newY, Set<MouseButton> pressedButtons) extends Record implements MouseEvent
This event is fired when mouse cursor was moved on a stage.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface MouseEvent

    MouseEvent.MouseButtonEvent, MouseEvent.MouseClickedEvent, MouseEvent.MouseCursorMovedEvent, MouseEvent.MousePressedEvent, MouseEvent.MouseReleasedEvent, MouseEvent.MouseScrolledEvent

    Method
    Description
    Point2D
    deltaMovement()
    Returns the delta movement vector from the old position to the new one.

    Returns the difference between the new and the old X coordinate of the mouse.

  • Constructor Details

    • MouseCursorMovedEvent

      public MouseCursorMovedEvent(Stage stage, double oldX, double oldY, double newX, double newY, Set<MouseButton> pressedButtons)
      Constructs a new MouseCursorMovedEvent.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null, or if pressedButtons contains nulls

    • MouseCursorMovedEvent

      public MouseCursorMovedEvent(Stage stage, double oldX, double oldY, double newX, double newY, MouseButton... pressedButtons)
      Constructs a new MouseCursorMovedEvent.
      Parameters:
      stage - the stage on which the mouse was moved
      oldX - the old X coordinate of the mouse
      oldY - the old Y coordinate of the mouse
      newX - the new X coordinate of the mouse
      newY - the new Y coordinate of the mouse
      pressedButtons - the buttons that were pressed when the mouse was moved
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null, or if pressedButtons contains nulls

  • Method Details

    • x

      public double x()
      Returns the X coordinate on the stage where this event was performed. 0 is leftmost coordinate. For this event, it's equal to the new X coordinate.
      Specified by:
      x in interface MouseEvent
      Returns:
      the X coordinate

    • y

      public double y()
      Returns the Y coordinate on the stage where this event was performed. 0 is topmost coordinate. For this event, it's equal to the new Y coordinate.
      Specified by:
      y in interface MouseEvent
      Returns:
      the Y coordinate

    • deltaX

      public double deltaX()
      Returns the difference between the new and the old X coordinate of the mouse.
      Returns:
      delta movement along the X axis

    • deltaY

      public double deltaY()
      Returns the difference between the new and the old Y coordinate of the mouse.
      Returns:
      delta movement along the Y axis

    • oldPosition

      public Point2D oldPosition()
      Returns the old position of the mouse.
      Returns:
      the old position

    • newPosition

      public Point2D newPosition()
      Returns the new position of the mouse.
      Returns:
      the new position

    • position

      public Point2D position()
      Description copied from interface: MouseEvent
      Returns the position on the stage where this event was performed.
      Specified by:
      position in interface MouseEvent
      Returns:
      the position

    • deltaMovement

      public Point2D deltaMovement()
      Returns the delta movement vector from the old position to the new one.
      Returns:
      the delta movement vector
      See Also:

      • deltaY()

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:

      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
